_description: Expected output for session-fixture.jsonl acceptance verification
_note: Run the script with --fixture scripts/fixtures/session-fixture.jsonl and diff dataset.json against the 'episodes' array here (ignoring episode_id which is a random UUID)

episodes._description: Episode 1: beads-tasks:beads-core — explicit trigger via Skill tool
Episode 2: complexity-review:complexity-review — rename alias -> project-review; ambient trigger

_design_notes: commit-commands episodes (4 turns) are filtered from main episode list — plugin not in marketplace.
unknown-plugin episode (1 turn) is also filtered.
Both appear in unmatched_plugins section of summary.md.
Episode 1: ls command ran twice with identical input => retries=1.
Episode 1: 'actually no, don't do that' text matches CORRECTION_RE => user_corrections=1.
Episode 1: is_error=true on bash failure tool_result => tool_errors=1.
Episode 1: the permission denial (is_error=true + doesn't want to proceed) is in commit-commands episode, not here.
Episode 2: no Skill tool use before it => trigger_type=ambient.
Episode 2: complexity-review plugin resolved via rename alias to project-review.
